name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro
description: Features a titanium design, 48MP main camera, A17 Pro chip, and a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Packed with a 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display, 200MP main camera, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, and a built-in S Pen.

name: Google Pixel 8 Pro
description: An elegant device featuring standout AI tools, a super bright 6.7-inch display, and class-leading cameras powered by Google Tensor G3.

name: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5
description: A flagship folding phone featuring a massive 7.6-inch inner display, powerful multitasking capabilities, and a refined hinge.

name: Nothing Phone (2)
description: A unique smartphone featuring the Glyph Interface, Snapdragon 8+ Gen 1, and a transparent glass back design.
